TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Satapangan_ira_ko_salisin_to_hafay, title = Satapangan_ira_ko_salisin_to_hafay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Satapangan_ira_ko_salisin_to_hafay} }

S.FORM: Satapangan ira ko salisin to hafay Tadamakadofah ko lisain ato pinangan i 'orip no Pangcah, o kahacecay a finacadan maemin ira ko sapisalisin a demak, pakayni to polong a finacadan, roma i madenga ko paytemek, anca ano malecad malacecay ko kahacecay no masakapotay a tamdaw i pisalisinan to i, maemin midoedo to lisin mileca to lekakawa. Pakayni i salisin no Yincomin i Taywan no kawakwasan a sowal ira kono pitooran ato pisalisin a tatodong, mararid ato 'icel no kawakawasan a marariting, malopidoedoan to tanengnengan a ma'orip tona hekal, ira ko 'icel no kawas a pipadang ato mapalemed no kawas sa, saka o kawas ato tamdaw ira to ko katatelek, onini ko litapangan to pisalisin a demak koni. Itrini i salisin a sowal no kawakawasan i, mangaay to mahapinang ko kasafinacadan no Yincomin no Taywan to karariting no tamdaw ato kawas hananay ato pakayniay to pitooran a demak, malasakangaay ho mahapinang a minengneng to kasa'etal ato cakalecad ko pala no ka'oripan, malasakapalowad ko katadamaan no kasasiroma no finacadan a salisin no demak. Tinako to lilengatan no hafay pisalisin no Pangcah, itini i codad no kawakawasa a sowal ira masowal o calowayay to serangawan a tamdaw i hekal tayra i kakarayan minanamay to no kawasan sapisalisin to sakafangcal no lingad a demak, maherek patiko to minokay, nano itiya misatapang to ira to ko sapisalisin a demak no tamdaw, No telangan ho a mihecaan, Kakomodan Sapatorok a kawas maepod itini. caho caho mafirang to riyar misatapang to mahengheng, Kakomodan Sapatorok a kaws tangsol to minokay talakakarayan, nika o wawa nira ci Sera ato ci Nakaw mikalic to dodang milaliw tayra i Cilangasan, saenger sato itira a paloma', matenes to raramod sato a tatosa. Milalang ko kawas mararamod ko malekakaay, nika o awaay to ko fafana'en koni a demak, ira ko talaw nangra maketer no kawas, saka o manmaan mina'on cangra, orasaka ca saca pakakera to pades cangra. Iko to makera nangra ko hafay, ciwawa to lalima, safangcal sa malemed ko 'orip nangra. Harateng sato ci Sera ato ci Nakaw, hatini ko nika fangcal malemed ko 'orip, o painian to no kawas a madipot, ano halo piaray a mita'ong a demak mafokil, o mamaaketon to a molahad ko pinaloma sato, orasaka ocor hanto ci Tomay Masera,Tapang Masera tatosa fa'inayan a wawa, tayra i pito'asan a minanam. Mitoor to to sowal no kawas mafana' to sakilisin a demak ato rarekoen, saheto sakitini no panayan a kawas ato no sakito'as a kawas ko mirekoan a demak. Itini tonina sakilisin a sowal no kawakawasan, tadamahapinang no mita ko kinaira no sapaloma ato sakilisin no tamdaw, maemin na iromaay a kanatal pafelian, o sapiarayaw ato pinanay makadofah to laday, orasaka misalisin ko tamdaw a mita'ong mingodo ko faloco' ato sakacaciyawan malalicay to kawas, itini mikitado toni a kawas patalahekal to no faloco'an a mingodo. O lisin hananay milecad to no finacadan a kawas mararitiriting to, mangaay kita pakaynien to sowal no kawasan to pisalisin a minengneng to rayray a kawas no kasafinacadan ato pitooran a kawas. Pi'arawan to lakaw 李景崇,1998," .
S.PHON: satapaŋan ira ko~u saɾisin to~u ħafaj taɬ~ɮamakaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u ɾisain ato~u pinaŋan i ʡo~urip no~u paŋʦaħ, o~u kaħaʦəʦaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan maəmin ira ko~u sapisaɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak, pakajni to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ro~uma i maɬ~ɮəŋa ko~u pajtəmək, anʦa ano~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u kaħaʦəʦaj no~u masakapo~utaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i pisaɾisinan to~u i, maəmin miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u ɾisin miɾəʦa to~u ɾəkakawa. pakajni i saɾisin no~u jinʦo~umin i tajwan no~u kawakwasan a so~uwaɾ ira ko~uno~u pito~uo~uran ato~u pisaɾisin a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, marariɬ~ɮ ato~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kawakawasan a mararitiŋ, maɾo~upiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan to~u tanəŋnəŋan a maʡo~urip to~una ħəkaɾ, ira ko~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kawas a pipaɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u mapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas sa, saka o~u kawas ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw ira to~u ko~u katatəɾək, o~unini ko~u ɾitapaŋan to~u pisaɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~uni. itrini i saɾisin a so~uwaɾ no~u kawakawasan i, maŋaaj to~u maħapinaŋ ko~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin no~u tajwan to~u kararitiŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u kawas ħananaj ato~u pakajniaj to~u pito~uo~uran a ɬ~ɮəmak, maɾasakaŋaaj ħo~u maħapinaŋ a minəŋnəŋ to~u kasaʡətaɾ ato~u ʦakaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u paɾa no~u kaʡo~uripan, maɾasakapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u kasasiro~uma no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a saɾisin no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. tinako~u to~u ɾiɾəŋatan no~u ħafaj pisaɾisin no~u paŋʦaħ, itini i ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u kawakawasa a so~uwaɾ ira maso~uwaɾ o~u ʦaɾo~uwajaj to~u səraŋawan a tamɬ~ɮaw i ħəkaɾ tajra i kakarajan minanamaj to~u no~u kawasan sapisaɾisin to~u sakafaŋʦaɾ no~u ɾiŋaɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮəmak, maħərək patiko~u to~u mino~ukaj, nano~u itija misatapaŋ to~u ira to~u ko~u sapisaɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, no~u təɾaŋan ħo~u a miħəʦaan, kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan sapato~uro~uk a kawas maəpo~uɬ~ɮ itini. ʦaħo~u ʦaħo~u mafiraŋ to~u rijar misatapaŋ to~u maħəŋħəŋ, kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan sapato~uro~uk a kaws taŋso~uɾ to~u mino~ukaj taɾakakarajan, nika o~u wawa nira ʦi səra ato~u ʦi nakaw mikaɾiʦ to~u ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮaŋ miɾaɾiw tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan, saəŋər sato~u itira a paɾo~umaʡ, matənəs to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u a tato~usa. miɾaɾaŋ ko~u kawas mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u maɾəkakaaj, nika o~u awaaj to~u ko~u fafanaʡən ko~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak, ira ko~u taɾaw naŋra makətər no~u kawas, saka o~u manmaan minaʡo~un ʦaŋra, o~urasaka ʦa saʦa pakakəra to~u paɬ~ɮəs ʦaŋra. iko~u to~u makəra naŋra ko~u ħafaj, ʦiwawa to~u ɾaɾima, safaŋʦaɾ sa maɾəməɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡo~urip naŋra. ħaratəŋ sato~u ʦi səra ato~u ʦi nakaw, ħatini ko~u nika faŋʦaɾ maɾəməɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡo~urip, o~u painian to~u no~u kawas a maɬ~ɮipo~ut, ano~u ħaɾo~u piaraj a mitaʡo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak mafo~ukiɾ, o~u mamaakəto~un to~u a mo~uɾaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u pinaɾo~uma sato~u, o~urasaka o~uʦo~ur ħanto~u ʦi to~umaj masəra,tapaŋ masəra tato~usa faʡinajan a wawa, tajra i pito~uʡasan a minanam. mito~uo~ur to~u to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas mafanaʡ to~u sakiɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak ato~u rarəko~uən, saħəto~u sakitini no~u panajan a kawas ato~u no~u sakito~uʡas a kawas ko~u mirəko~uan a ɬ~ɮəmak. itini to~unina sakiɾisin a so~uwaɾ no~u kawakawasan, taɬ~ɮamaħapinaŋ no~u mita ko~u kinaira no~u sapaɾo~uma ato~u sakiɾisin no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, maəmin na iro~umaaj a kanataɾ pafəɾian, o~u sapiarajaw ato~u pinanaj makaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ to~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj, o~urasaka misaɾisin ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mitaʡo~uŋ miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u sakaʦaʦijawan maɾaɾiʦaj to~u kawas, itini mikitaɬ~ɮo~u to~uni a kawas pataɾaħəkaɾ to~u no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡan a miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u. o~u ɾisin ħananaj miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a kawas mararitiritiŋ to~u, maŋaaj kita pakajniən to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawasan to~u pisaɾisin a minəŋnəŋ to~u rajraj a kawas no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u pito~uo~uran a kawas. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ***,****," .
S.FORM: Satapangan ira ko salisin to hafay Tadamakadofah ko lisain ato pinangan i 'orip no Pangcah, o kahacecay a finacadan maemin ira ko sapisalisin a demak, pakayni to polong a finacadan, roma i madenga ko paytemek, anca ano malecad malacecay ko kahacecay no masakapotay a tamdaw i pisalisinan to i, maemin midoedo to lisin mileca to lekakawa. Pakayni i salisin no Yincomin i Taywan no kawakwasan a sowal ira kono pitooran ato pisalisin a tatodong, mararid ato 'icel no kawakawasan a marariting, malopidoedoan to tanengnengan a ma'orip tona hekal, ira ko 'icel no kawas a pipadang ato mapalemed no kawas sa, saka o kawas ato tamdaw ira to ko katatelek, onini ko litapangan to pisalisin a demak koni. Itrini i salisin a sowal no kawakawasan i, mangaay to mahapinang ko kasafinacadan no Yincomin no Taywan to karariting no tamdaw ato kawas hananay ato pakayniay to pitooran a demak, malasakangaay ho mahapinang a minengneng to kasa'etal ato cakalecad ko pala no ka'oripan, malasakapalowad ko katadamaan no kasasiroma no finacadan a salisin no demak. Tinako to lilengatan no hafay pisalisin no Pangcah, itini i codad no kawakawasa a sowal ira masowal o calowayay to serangawan a tamdaw i hekal tayra i kakarayan minanamay to no kawasan sapisalisin to sakafangcal no lingad a demak, maherek patiko to minokay, nano itiya misatapang to ira to ko sapisalisin a demak no tamdaw, No telangan ho a mihecaan, Kakomodan Sapatorok a kawas maepod itini. caho caho mafirang to riyar misatapang to mahengheng, Kakomodan Sapatorok a kaws tangsol to minokay talakakarayan, nika o wawa nira ci Sera ato ci Nakaw mikalic to dodang milaliw tayra i Cilangasan, saenger sato itira a paloma', matenes to raramod sato a tatosa. Milalang ko kawas mararamod ko malekakaay, nika o awaay to ko fafana'en koni a demak, ira ko talaw nangra maketer no kawas, saka o manmaan mina'on cangra, orasaka ca saca pakakera to pades cangra. Iko to makera nangra ko hafay, ciwawa to lalima, safangcal sa malemed ko 'orip nangra. Harateng sato ci Sera ato ci Nakaw, hatini ko nika fangcal malemed ko 'orip, o painian to no kawas a madipot, ano halo piaray a mita'ong a demak mafokil, o mamaaketon to a molahad ko pinaloma sato, orasaka ocor hanto ci Tomay Masera,Tapang Masera tatosa fa'inayan a wawa, tayra i pito'asan a minanam. Mitoor to to sowal no kawas mafana' to sakilisin a demak ato rarekoen, saheto sakitini no panayan a kawas ato no sakito'as a kawas ko mirekoan a demak. Itini tonina sakilisin a sowal no kawakawasan, tadamahapinang no mita ko kinaira no sapaloma ato sakilisin no tamdaw, maemin na iromaay a kanatal pafelian, o sapiarayaw ato pinanay makadofah to laday, orasaka misalisin ko tamdaw a mita'ong mingodo ko faloco' ato sakacaciyawan malalicay to kawas, itini mikitado toni a kawas patalahekal to no faloco'an a mingodo. O lisin hananay milecad to no finacadan a kawas mararitiriting to, mangaay kita pakaynien to sowal no kawasan to pisalisin a minengneng to rayray a kawas no kasafinacadan ato pitooran a kawas. Pi'arawan to lakaw 李景崇,1998," .
S.PHON: satapaŋan ira ko~u saɾisin to~u ħafaj taɬ~ɮamakaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u ɾisain ato~u pinaŋan i ʡo~urip no~u paŋʦaħ, o~u kaħaʦəʦaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan maəmin ira ko~u sapisaɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak, pakajni to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, ro~uma i maɬ~ɮəŋa ko~u pajtəmək, anʦa ano~u maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ maɾaʦəʦaj ko~u kaħaʦəʦaj no~u masakapo~utaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i pisaɾisinan to~u i, maəmin miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u ɾisin miɾəʦa to~u ɾəkakawa. pakajni i saɾisin no~u jinʦo~umin i tajwan no~u kawakwasan a so~uwaɾ ira ko~uno~u pito~uo~uran ato~u pisaɾisin a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, marariɬ~ɮ ato~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kawakawasan a mararitiŋ, maɾo~upiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan to~u tanəŋnəŋan a maʡo~urip to~una ħəkaɾ, ira ko~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u kawas a pipaɬ~ɮaŋ ato~u mapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas sa, saka o~u kawas ato~u tamɬ~ɮaw ira to~u ko~u katatəɾək, o~unini ko~u ɾitapaŋan to~u pisaɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~uni. itrini i saɾisin a so~uwaɾ no~u kawakawasan i, maŋaaj to~u maħapinaŋ ko~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin no~u tajwan to~u kararitiŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u kawas ħananaj ato~u pakajniaj to~u pito~uo~uran a ɬ~ɮəmak, maɾasakaŋaaj ħo~u maħapinaŋ a minəŋnəŋ to~u kasaʡətaɾ ato~u ʦakaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u paɾa no~u kaʡo~uripan, maɾasakapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u kasasiro~uma no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a saɾisin no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. tinako~u to~u ɾiɾəŋatan no~u ħafaj pisaɾisin no~u paŋʦaħ, itini i ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u kawakawasa a so~uwaɾ ira maso~uwaɾ o~u ʦaɾo~uwajaj to~u səraŋawan a tamɬ~ɮaw i ħəkaɾ tajra i kakarajan minanamaj to~u no~u kawasan sapisaɾisin to~u sakafaŋʦaɾ no~u ɾiŋaɬ~ɮ a ɬ~ɮəmak, maħərək patiko~u to~u mino~ukaj, nano~u itija misatapaŋ to~u ira to~u ko~u sapisaɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, no~u təɾaŋan ħo~u a miħəʦaan, kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan sapato~uro~uk a kawas maəpo~uɬ~ɮ itini. ʦaħo~u ʦaħo~u mafiraŋ to~u rijar misatapaŋ to~u maħəŋħəŋ, kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan sapato~uro~uk a kaws taŋso~uɾ to~u mino~ukaj taɾakakarajan, nika o~u wawa nira ʦi səra ato~u ʦi nakaw mikaɾiʦ to~u ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮaŋ miɾaɾiw tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan, saəŋər sato~u itira a paɾo~umaʡ, matənəs to~u raramo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u a tato~usa. miɾaɾaŋ ko~u kawas mararamo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u maɾəkakaaj, nika o~u awaaj to~u ko~u fafanaʡən ko~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak, ira ko~u taɾaw naŋra makətər no~u kawas, saka o~u manmaan minaʡo~un ʦaŋra, o~urasaka ʦa saʦa pakakəra to~u paɬ~ɮəs ʦaŋra. iko~u to~u makəra naŋra ko~u ħafaj, ʦiwawa to~u ɾaɾima, safaŋʦaɾ sa maɾəməɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡo~urip naŋra. ħaratəŋ sato~u ʦi səra ato~u ʦi nakaw, ħatini ko~u nika faŋʦaɾ maɾəməɬ~ɮ ko~u ʡo~urip, o~u painian to~u no~u kawas a maɬ~ɮipo~ut, ano~u ħaɾo~u piaraj a mitaʡo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak mafo~ukiɾ, o~u mamaakəto~un to~u a mo~uɾaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u pinaɾo~uma sato~u, o~urasaka o~uʦo~ur ħanto~u ʦi to~umaj masəra,tapaŋ masəra tato~usa faʡinajan a wawa, tajra i pito~uʡasan a minanam. mito~uo~ur to~u to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas mafanaʡ to~u sakiɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak ato~u rarəko~uən, saħəto~u sakitini no~u panajan a kawas ato~u no~u sakito~uʡas a kawas ko~u mirəko~uan a ɬ~ɮəmak. itini to~unina sakiɾisin a so~uwaɾ no~u kawakawasan, taɬ~ɮamaħapinaŋ no~u mita ko~u kinaira no~u sapaɾo~uma ato~u sakiɾisin no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, maəmin na iro~umaaj a kanataɾ pafəɾian, o~u sapiarajaw ato~u pinanaj makaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ to~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj, o~urasaka misaɾisin ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mitaʡo~uŋ miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ato~u sakaʦaʦijawan maɾaɾiʦaj to~u kawas, itini mikitaɬ~ɮo~u to~uni a kawas pataɾaħəkaɾ to~u no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡan a miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u. o~u ɾisin ħananaj miɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a kawas mararitiritiŋ to~u, maŋaaj kita pakajniən to~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawasan to~u pisaɾisin a minəŋnəŋ to~u rajraj a kawas no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u pito~uo~uran a kawas. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ***,****," .
